title: Highway Resort
desc: A bride-to-be is abducted for ransom just before her wedding. During captivity, she forms an uneasy bond with her kidnapper, testing loyalties, love, and safety.

title: Teri Bhabhi Hai Pagle
desc: Aspiring director Dev gets superstar Raj to produce his film, starring Ragni. Shooting in Goa is disrupted when their financier, a mobster, falls for Ragni, creating a chaotic love triangle.

desc: 'The Notebook' is a happy story about two people who discover love in an unexpected way. Their journey shows the beauty and warmth of true romance.

desc: A thriller film revolving around a mysterious mobile phone that triggers dangerous events, leading to suspense, fear, and unexpected twists as reality blurs with the unknown.

desc: Convict Yogi Shankar, after serving seven years, abducts Judge Jagdish Verma's pregnant wife, leading to a dark revenge scheme that threatens the entire Verma family.

desc: A drama capturing relationships, emotions, and life's challenges through Dhaani's journey, exploring themes of love, resilience, and personal strength in everyday struggles.
